template.name: Dockerfile
template.content:
FROM docker.m.daocloud.io/openjdk:17 LABEL maintainer="ThinkGem@163.com" ENV TZ=Asia/Shanghai ENV LANG=C.UTF-8 WORKDIR /app
#RUN mkdir -p WEB-INF #COPY jeesite.lic WEB-INF/ COPY ./maven/web.war ./
ENV JAVA_OPTS "-Dspring.profiles.active=prod" ENV JAVA_OPTS "$JAVA_OPTS -DcustomLogPath=/data"
VOLUME /tmp /data
ENTRYPOINT ["bash", "-c", "if [ -f 'web.war' ]; then jar -xvf web.war && \ rm web.war; fi && cd WEB-INF && sh startup.sh"]
EXPOSE 8989
#docker run -p 8989:8989 thinkgem/jeesite-cloud-module-${moduleCode}:latest
